title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is a feature by Anthropic that enables users to create website prototypes, presentations, and landing pages using AI. It supports multiple design options including prototype, slide deck, templates, and custom modes, and can generate responsive code from a single prompt.
